task_completion.description: Update the Jitsi .env configuration file with whiteboard settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal or text editor showing the file /home/ga/jitsi/.env being modified to include WHITEBOARD_ENABLED=true and WHITEBOARD_COLLAB_SERVER_PUBLIC_URL=https://wbd.meet.jitsi.

task_completion.description: Apply the configuration by restarting the Docker containers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands indicating the Jitsi Docker containers were restarted (e.g., 'docker compose down' followed by 'docker compose up -d', or 'docker compose restart') in the /home/ga/jitsi directory.

task_completion.description: Join the specified Jitsi meeting room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open to http://localhost:8080/WhiteboardGlossarySession or the Jitsi Meet interface clearly displaying the room name 'WhiteboardGlossarySession'.

task_completion.description: Enable and open the whiteboard feature in the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Excalidraw collaborative whiteboard interface actively open and visible within the Jitsi meeting window.
Look for the exact text 'Glossary Terms' written or typed onto the Excalidraw whiteboard canvas.
Look for a terminal command creating or verifying the file, such as 'echo "done" > /tmp/whiteboard_enabled.txt' or 'cat /tmp/whiteboard_enabled.txt' outputting the word 'done'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a real web browser to access the Jitsi meeting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the Jitsi meeting is running inside a standard web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) with the correct localhost URL, rather than a local HTML file or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the text was written on the actual whiteboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that 'Glossary Terms' is rendered on the Excalidraw canvas (using the text or draw tool), and not just typed into the Jitsi text chat, a separate text editor, or overlaid via image editing.

integrity.description: Verify the completion file was genuinely created.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the terminal shows a valid command writing to /tmp/whiteboard_enabled.txt, rather than just echoing the word 'done' to the console without redirecting to the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The configuration file must be located at /home/ga/jitsi/.env. The standard environment variable for the Excalidraw backend public URL is WHITEBOARD_COLLAB_SERVER_PUBLIC_URL. The correct meeting URL format to verify is http://localhost:8080/WhiteboardGlossarySession.
